artifacts.description: Primary validation report covering front matter checks, filename conventions, layout integrity, build attempt, link spot checks, and recommendations.
artifacts.verify_hint: Read end-to-end and confirm each required section is present with concrete file-path evidence.

artifacts.description: Structured per-file front matter validation results including status, issues, warnings, and summary counts.
artifacts.verify_hint: Open JSON and confirm all 14 collection markdown files are present with PASS/FAIL and issue details.

artifacts.description: Human-readable front matter validation output grouped by file.
artifacts.verify_hint: Read and cross-check warning lines against JSON output and report summary.

artifacts.description: Layout cross-reference dataset: available layouts, referenced layouts, missing and orphaned layout lists.
artifacts.verify_hint: Confirm referenced layouts map to _layouts files and orphaned layouts are informational only.

artifacts.description: Raw stderr/stdout capture from `bundle exec jekyll build` attempt.
artifacts.verify_hint: Inspect log to verify fatal failure reason and ensure report categorization matches log lines.

artifacts.description: Permalink/sidebar comparison and extracted internal-link spot-check records.
artifacts.verify_hint: Confirm static permalinks, sidebar links, and internal-link counts used in the report are accurate.

artifacts.description: Execution report with commands run, changed files, evidence, acceptance checks, blockers, and next steps.
artifacts.verify_hint: Review for completeness against subtask-agents mandatory result format and acceptance checklist.
